features: 【High Quality Material】The colorful barrettes are made of metal with different unicorn butterfly flower pattern, designed with bright colors shimmer, various resin decorations on top, safe and reliable, so you can rest assured your hairstyle.

【Compact & Easy to Use】Each hair clip is about 4cm long, which is very suitable for baby girls, toddlers, children, and adolescents to wear, suitable for thick, thin, curly or straight hair, with non slip design and can be tightly fixed on your hair.

【Suitable for All Hairstyles】Each cute hair clips can be matched with various hairstyles and clothes. Wearing them can make your girls the focus, even in dimly lit places. Suitable for various hair types, whether your hair is long or short, straight or curly.

【Practical & Great Gift Idea】Pretty hair barrettes are practical and inexpensive to give for Christmas as a stocking stuffer, birthdays, school gift exchanges, and are ideal for a party goody bag. Ideal for unicorn party, school events, costume party, and even daily wear.

【Abundant Colors & Patterns】You will receive 12 pcs / 6 pairs girl hair clips in different colors and styles, includes unicorn, star, rainbow, flower, mermaid, and shell, 4 colors include blue, pink, yellow and purple, which can meet the needs of daily use, and you can also share them with others.
description: Product description NICECONE Unicorn Barrettes Mermaid Rainbow Flowers Cute Cartoon Hair Clips for Girls Women, Unicorn Birthday Party Gifts No Slip Snap Barrettes Hair Pins Unicorn Hair Accessories Features: - Craft from resins this hair clip is beautiful while maintaining a lightweight feel for comfortable wear. - The color is not easy to fade after long-term use. It will go with almost all clothing, hair color and hairstyles. - You can easily create various hairstyles, and create professional evening wear and casual daily wear. - Make you more attractive in daily life, parties, dance parties, weddings, birthdays, appointments, holiday and taking pictures. ﻿ Specifications: Material: Metal, Resins Size: About.4cm/1.57inch Color: Multi ﻿ Package Includes: 12 Pcs Hair Clip Directions Open the clip, place it on the desired section of hair, and secure it to hold the hairstyle in place.
